creator: ormandj@gmail.com
text:
I am seeing the same issue:

server name: SHOUTcast/FreeBSD4 v1.9.2
bitrate: 192
meta interval: 8192
relay port: 8000
[getting track name... ]
[ripping...    ]  -  [  2.54M]
[ripping...    ]  -  [  9.63M]
[ripping...    ]  -  [  8.16M]
[ripping...    ]  -  [  6.77M]

I have seen a post about this, but the --without-included-tre fix is already
in the port makefile.

http://streamripper.sourceforge.net/phpBB2/viewtopic.php?t=2777

It seems to be specific to the *bsd* OSs.

Thanks,
David
